2603.28610.title: ResAdapt: Adaptive Resolution for Efficient Multimodal Reasoning
2603.28610.paper_summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve stronger visual understanding by scaling input fidelity, yet the resulting visual token growth makes jointly sustaining high spatial resolution and long temporal context prohibitive. We argue that the bottleneck lies not in how post-encoding representations are compressed but in the volume of pixels the encoder receives, and address it with ResAdapt, an Input-side adaptation framework that learns how much visual budget each frame should receive before encoding. ResAdapt couples a lightweight Allocator with an unchanged MLLM backbone, so the backbone retains its native visual-token interface while receiving an operator-transformed input. We formulate allocation as a contextual bandit and train the Allocator with Cost-Aware Policy Optimization (CAPO), which converts sparse rollout feedback into a stable accuracy-cost learning signal. Across budget-controlled video QA, temporal grounding, and image reasoning tasks, ResAdapt improves low-budget operating points and often lies on or near the efficiency-accuracy frontier, with the clearest gains on reasoning-intensive benchmarks under aggressive compression. Notably, ResAdapt supports up to 16x more frames at the same visual budget while delivering over 15% performance gain. Code is available at https://github.com/Xnhyacinth/ResAdapt.
2603.28610.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型 (MLLMs) 通過提升輸入的真實性來實現更強的視覺理解，但隨之而來的視覺標記增長使得同時維持高空間解析度和長時間上下文變得困難。我們認為瓶頸不在於後編碼表示的壓縮方式，而在於編碼器接收到的像素數量，並通過 ResAdapt 解決這一問題，這是一個輸入端適應框架，學習每幀在編碼前應該獲得多少視覺預算。ResAdapt 將一個輕量級的分配器與不變的 MLLM 骨幹結合，使骨幹保留其原生的視覺標記介面，同時接收經過運算符轉換的輸入。我們將分配形式化為一個上下文強盜問題，並使用成本感知策略優化 (CAPO) 訓練分配器，這將稀疏的回饋轉換為穩定的準確性-成本學習信號。在預算控制的視頻問答、時間基準和圖像推理任務中，ResAdapt 改善了低預算的運行點，並且通常位於效率-準確性邊界上或附近，在激進壓縮下的推理密集基準中獲得了最明顯的增益。值得注意的是，ResAdapt 在相同視覺預算下支持多達 16 倍的幀數，同時提供超過 15% 的性能增益。代碼可在 https://github.com/Xnhyacinth/ResAdapt 獲得。
2603.28610.author: Huanxuan Liao et.al.
2603.28610.authors: Huanxuan Liao, Zhongtao Jiang, Yupu Hao, Yuqiao Tan, Shizhu He, Jun Zhao, Kun Xu, Kang Liu
